top.title: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DR Congo an international emergency
top.summary: The agency added that the outbreak, with around 246 cases and 80 deaths, does not meet the criteria of pandemic emergency.

top.title: How worrying is the Ebola outbreak in DR Congo?
top.summary: An outbreak in DR Congo has been declared a health emergency, with almost 250 suspected cases reported.

top.title: Large-scale Ukrainian drone attack kills three in Moscow region, says Russia
top.summary: Ukraine's president says the strikes are a "justified" response to deadly Russian attacks on Ukrainian cities.

top.title: X pledges quicker action on hate and terror content in the UK
top.summary: Ofcom said the commitments were of particular importance after recent crimes targeting Jewish communities in the UK.

top.title: Inside the secretive and lucrative world of orchid breeding
